overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through tall prairie grass toward a distant tree line under clear afternoon skies. A cowboy on horseback enters the frame from the right and rides ahead up the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt trail through tall grass toward a distant tree line

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden structure partially obscured by trees on the left horizon
cluster of mature oak trees with dense green canopies lining the path ahead
narrow worn path cutting through the tall grass prairie
tall green prairie grass swaying in the wind, filling the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through an open prairie landscape under a clear blue sky. A weathered wooden ruin sits on the left horizon while scattered oak trees mark the destination ahead. The dirt trail winds through swaying tall grass, with the character's shadow occasionally visible on the ground.

events.description: cowboy on horseback enters from the right and rides ahead up the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail as a mounted cowboy passes by and rides ahead

notable_agents.action: cowboy wearing a hat riding a brown horse with a lasso, entering from the right and trotting ahead up the trail

segments.scene_description: A cowboy on horseback suddenly enters from the right, riding a brown horse equipped with a lasso. The rider trots ahead up the dirt trail, moving away from the camera toward the distant tree line. The wooden ruin from earlier has passed out of view behind the camera as the walk continues through the sunlit prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sunlit prairie that shifts from a solitary trek past ruins to a shared path with a passing rider. It begins by gliding along a winding dirt trail through swaying tall grass under a clear blue sky, with a weathered wooden ruin visible on the left horizon. As the camera advances toward a distant line of oak trees, the ruin recedes behind the field of view. The scene then shifts as a cowboy on a brown horse equipped with a lasso enters from the right, trotting ahead up the trail. The camera continues its steady pace through the open landscape, following the rider as he moves away toward the tree line.
